steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Mrs. Sommers ‘becomes engrossed in the decision of how she should spend’ her money. The blank needs a quotation that shows deep, absorbed engagement with spending decisions specifically.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "The question of investment was one that occupied her greatly. For a day or two she walked about apparently in a dreamy state, but really absorbed in speculation and calculation.": directly shows her engrossed in financial planning. ✓
  • Choice B — "The neighbors sometimes talked of certain 'better days' that little Mrs. Sommers had known before she had ever thought of being Mrs. Sommers.": describes her past, not her engagement with spending decisions. ✗
  • Choice C — "Mrs. Sommers was one who knew the value of bargains; who could stand for hours making her way inch by inch toward the desired object that was selling below cost.": describes a general shopping habit, not absorption in a specific spending decision. ✗
  • Choice D — "It seemed to her a very large amount of money, and the way in which it stuffed and bulged her worn old porte-monnaie gave her a feeling of importance such as she had not enjoyed for years.": describes her feeling about the sum, not her engagement with deciding how to spend it. ✗
That matches Choice A — "The question of investment was one that occupied her greatly. For a day or two she walked about apparently in a dreamy state, but really absorbed in speculation and calculation.".
